data.name: MainWindow_CloseConfirm_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit?

data.name: MainView_Default_Description
data.value: Select the function page on the left.

data.name: BindingPage_Description
data.value: This section introduces the usage of ReactiveUI's Binding in Avalonia.

data.name: BindingPage_TwoWayBind_Description
data.value: Data flows bidirectionally between ViewModel and View. Type in the input box to see the output update in real time.

data.name: BindingPage_CommandBind_Description
data.value: Buttons are bound to ReactiveCommands in the ViewModel. Click the buttons to increment, decrement, or reset the counter.

data.name: BindingPage_BoolBind_Description
data.value: A boolean property is synchronized between CheckBox and ViewModel. The status label reflects the current state via OneWayBind.

data.name: HomePage_Content
data.value:
# Welcome to AvaloniaProject!
A modern Avalonia UI desktop application demonstrating MVVM architecture, AOT compilation, and real-time internationalization.
---
## Tech Stack
| Category | Library | |---|---| | UI Framework | [Avalonia 12.0](https://avaloniaui.net/) | | MVVM | [ReactiveUI](https://reactiveui.net/) + Source Generators | | DI | Splat (constructor injection) | | Theme | [Semi.Avalonia](https://github.com/irihitech/Semi.Avalonia) + [Ursa](https://github.com/irihitech/Ursa.Avalonia) | | Icons | [Optris Material Design](https://github.com/Optris/Optris.Icons.Avalonia) | | Markdown | [LiveMarkdown.Avalonia](https://github.com/giacomelli/LiveMarkdown.Avalonia) | | Logging | NLog via Splat.NLog | | Runtime | .NET 10 with AOT |
---
## Architecture Highlights
- **Constructor injection** — all dependencies in composition root (`Program.cs`) - **AOT-safe ViewLocator** — type dictionary instead of reflection - **Compiled bindings** — AXAML `x:DataType` with compile-time validation - **Interface-based** — `ILocalizationService`, `IPageViewModel` for testability - **Activation lifecycle** — `WhenActivated` / `DisposeWith` for event cleanup - **Thread-safe localization** — `Lazy<T>` + `INotifyPropertyChanged` for XAML reactivity
---
## Explore
Use the **left sidebar** to navigate between pages:
- **Home** — This page, rendered with LiveMarkdown - **Binding** — Interactive ReactiveUI binding demonstrations
Use the **title bar** controls to switch languages or toggle the theme.

data.name: BindingPage_ListBind_Description
data.value: Buttons are bound to ReactiveCommands in the ViewModel. The list is bound to an observable collection in the ViewModel via OneWayBind. Click the buttons to add, remove, or reset records.
